title: acalypha filiformis var. goudotiana
intro: Acalypha filiformis var. goudotiana is a plant species commonly known as the Goudot's cup plant, belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Acalypha filiformis var. goudotiana are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
